layout.zcode_tools/marketplaces/<name>/: each marketplace is a self-contained ~/.zcode setup (AGENTS.md, config templates, mcp/hooks, skills/commands/agents, plugins)
layout.cli-tools/: installer: --marketplace <name> selects one setup and builds ~/.zcode from it (macOS + Ubuntu)
layout.build/: build artifacts: version.json, manifest.json, system files, secrets templates (shared across setups)
layout.development/: meta skills for developing this repo

backup_policy.rotation: lowest free slot 0-9; oldest (by mtime) overwritten when full, regardless of version

secrets.injection: ${VAR} placeholders in zcode_tools/marketplaces/<name>/*.template.json rendered at install time
